rationale.R1.2: The agent effectively addresses the logical consistency of the revisions by clearly explaining why certain claims were changed and providing a rationale for each modification.
rationale.RX.1: The agent discloses uncertainty where appropriate, such as when reporting on unverified cost figures or correlation numbers, and provides a detailed list of items that could not be verified.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers exactly the agreed-upon active set without any drift in scope.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content by carefully explaining each change and ensuring that the revised text does not overstate the results.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source (the original artifact) and reason, providing clear traceability.
